meaning: adj.信赖的,依靠的,信赖自己的
examples: The hostel is heavily reliant upon charity.
These people are not wholly reliant on Western charity.
They are reliant on a very limited number of exportable products.
And the town, historically reliant on industry and crisscrossed by pockmarked streets, isn't especially affluent either.
This is the part of the process that is reliant on innovation and invention.
